title: Strategy & Operations
key_evidence: London role CONFIRMED via Ashby posting API as distinct, listed role (separate from Madrid + multiple SF variants).
MUST-HAVEs are generalist and non-technical-gating: analytical/problem-solving, Excel/Sheets (SQL/Python/BI only 'a plus'), comms, 'Founder Mindset', fast-paced tolerance. Ryan clears all of these.
'Founder Mindset - here for a reason and ready to take risks' + 'Extreme Ownership' operating principle map to Ryan's first-employee/founder-associate background.

Role is ops/process-optimization heavy: analyze operational data, workflow automation, dashboards, procurement/contract management, finance-sales-legal coordination. This is process-rigor work, NOT community-led GTM (Ryan's spike).
Travel 50-75% for customer discovery/workshops/onsite — significant lifestyle gate.
Domain = enterprise logistics/supply-chain AI infra (YC S23, a16z + Base10, $60M+, ~140 employees) — outside Ryan's crypto/Web3 domain.
~140-person, well-funded, hot YC co with 85 open roles globally = high visibility, likely recruiter/hiring-manager screen rather than founder-read.
biggest_lever: Founder-mindset + extreme-ownership + first-employee-scaling-a-startup narrative directly answers the stated cultural bar; no hard technical blocker exists.
biggest_risk: Role rewards operational/data/process rigor in enterprise logistics, not Ryan's community-GTM/crypto spike; 50-75% travel plus high applicant volume at a hot YC co dilute his differentiation.
recency_note: Ashby publishedAt=2026-03-12 => 89 days (>12wk). HappyRobot runs MULTIPLE S&O-family reqs (Jan-22, Jan-23 + Strategy & Ops Engineer variants) so this London role is mature, not fresh; not a same-URL repost. >12wk => base G=10; ~140p hot YC co (78 open roles) => high applicant flood => -5 => G=5. Date source: api.ashbyhq.com/posting-api/job-board/happyrobot.ai (jobId bb5315cc).
momentum_signals: FUNDING (POSITIVE): $44M Series B led by Base10 (~$500M valuation), ~$62M total since 2022. Source: SiliconANGLE 2025-09-03, Yahoo Finance, upstartsmedia.

GROWTH (POSITIVE): revenue up 10x since Series A; 70+ enterprise customers incl. DHL, Ryder, Flexport. Funds earmarked to hire product, on-site and sales teams. Source: siliconangle, ycombinator.com/companies/happyrobot.

HIRING-INTENT (POSITIVE but US-centric): 85 open roles company-wide and actively hiring — but ~80 employees are SF-based; this London S&O seat is a single hub-expansion role within a heavily-SF org. Source: fastaijobs.com/companies/happyrobot.

ROLE-CHURN (NEUTRAL): multiple S&O-family reqs run in parallel (London + Madrid + SF variants); the family is continuously open, signalling steady-state hiring rather than a fresh push for this specific seat.
